name: linkedin-skills
description: 10 Claude Code and Codex skills for LinkedIn marketing: post writing, comment drafting, reply handler, hook extractor, humanizer (rewrite + audit + emoji + detector + rules sub-tools), profile optimizer, content planner, employee advocacy, thread monitor (author replies), engager analytics (likers + commenters ICP segmentation).
